extractText: PRIOR AUTHORIZATION REQUEST PA-017. Requested service: MRI lumbar spine without contrast (CPT 72148) following six weeks of conservative therapy for persistent radiculopathy. Payer: Summit Health Plan. Member ID and authorized units on the attached scanned page; some clinical justification handwritten on the scanned packet. Submitted by Summit Health Plan utilization management, 2026-06-09. Approved units and effective date partially handwritten on the scan.
